summary: Comprehensive testing of BlendLink bug fixes - Subscriptions, Wallet, Stripe Payments, Admin Panel. All critical features working correctly. 15/17 backend tests passed. 2 test failures are non-blocking: 1) subscription tiers API response format (test script issue), 2) Stripe Connect onboard returns 520 via Cloudflare (expected - Stripe Dashboard config required).

minor.issue: Returns 503 locally but 520 through Cloudflare - Stripe Connect requires dashboard configuration
WebSocket returning 403 - admin analytics WS connection failing
minor.notes: Non-blocking - admin panel works without real-time analytics

login_flow.details: User login with tester@blendlink.net / BlendLink2024! works correctly, redirects to /feed

subscriptions_page.details: All 4 membership tiers displayed (Bronze $4.99, Silver $9.99, Gold $14.99, Diamond $29.99) with full benefits, upgrade buttons generate valid Stripe checkout URLs

wallet_page.details: Balance display working (100B+ BL Coins), Stripe Connect section shows with expected error message, BL Coins packages visible (4 packages from $4.99-$29.99)

stripe_checkout.details: Clicking upgrade button on Bronze tier redirects to valid checkout.stripe.com URL

admin_login.details: Admin login with blendlinknet@gmail.com / Blend!Admin2026Link works correctly

admin_dashboard.details: Dashboard loads with user stats (116 users, 14 posts, 57 listings, 100B+ BL coins), quick actions, recent users

admin_custom_benefits.details: Custom Benefits page loads without errors, Create Benefit modal opens with all input fields working

admin_users.details: Admin users endpoint exists and returns 200 with auth

critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket analytics connection for admin panel returns 403 - consider adding graceful fallback or fixing WS auth
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core bug fixes verified working. Subscriptions page shows 4 tiers with correct pricing, checkout buttons redirect to Stripe. Wallet page sections all load. Admin panel fully functional with data loading. Stripe Connect onboard intentionally returns error (Stripe Dashboard config required). WebSocket analytics returns 403 but doesn't break functionality.

notes.stripe_connect: Stripe Connect onboard endpoint returns 503 (expected) - requires Stripe Dashboard platform profile configuration at https://dashboard.stripe.com/settings/connect/platform-profile
notes.subscription_tiers_api: API returns dictionary format {tier_name: {...}} not list - test script needs minor adjustment but UI handles correctly
